variables.notes: R:c. Used the unique current-maturity debt line to capture short-term debt while excluding lease liabilities. A current-liabilities 'Borrowings' line exists but is duplicated elsewhere on the sheet and is less precise in this output format.

candidates.why: Closest current-liability line related to taxes payable, though it also includes social security and may not be pure income taxes payable.

variables.notes: R:nc. No explicit 'taxes payable' or 'current tax liabilities' line is shown. 'Tax and social security' is the closest likely current tax payable proxy, but it may include payroll/social charges.
